message:
test(e2e): add Discovery & Trending E2E tests

Adds 24 E2E tests for trending and discovery functionality:
- Sort functionality tests (trending, newest, top-rated, most-copied)
- Category filtering with trending sort
- UI elements verification (dropdown icons, results count)
- Default behavior validation (trending as default sort)

Includes discovery-helpers.ts with reusable test utilities.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
